detail: Five approved representative combinations are implemented
Unsupported combinations use the existing policy fallback
ProgramBuilder contains no ratio-goal-days template matrix
Representative templates require squat, hinge, and upper-pull anchors
CoverageAccountingPolicy controls requested-slot candidate eligibility and credit
ExposureTargetTable numeric targets influence candidate scoring
FatigueSlotPolicy remains active for schedule and candidate safety
Required anchors are reduced before optional time trimming and produce hard issues if unfilled
Full ratio x goal x days implementation was not added
Seed files and canonical metadata CSV are unchanged
Room schema and user DB migration are unchanged
APK backup exists and matches source SHA-256
